calendar.title: Islamic Calendar
zakat.title: Zakat Calculator
zakat.subtitle: Calculate your annual Zakat obligation accurately.
zakat.hawlReminder: Reminder: Zakat is due on wealth held for one complete lunar year (Hawl). Ensure your wealth has been above the Nisab threshold for the full year before paying.
zakat.nisabDesc: Choose your preferred Nisab standard and enter the current metal price to calculate the minimum zakatable wealth threshold.
zakat.priceHint: Enter price in your local currency, or wait for auto-fetch
zakat.priceError: Could not load live price. Enter manually.
zakat.assetsDesc: Enter the current market value of all assets you have owned for one full lunar year.
zakat.goldValueHint: Total current value of gold jewellery and bullion
zakat.silverValueHint: Total current value of silver holdings
zakat.liabilitiesDesc: Enter debts that are due and payable immediately or within this lunar year.
zakat.debtsHint: Only debts due within the current year
zakat.nisabNotSet: Enter a metal price above to see the Nisab threshold and your eligibility.
zakat.disclaimer: This calculator provides an estimate for reference only. Consult a qualified Islamic scholar for your specific circumstances.
zakat.helpStep1: Select Nisab Standard — Gold (87.48 g, recommended) or Silver (612.36 g, lower threshold).
zakat.helpStep2: Metal Price — Live price is auto-fetched in USD/g. Type to override with your local currency price.
zakat.helpStep3: Assets — Enter current market value of: cash & bank, gold, silver, business inventory, investments, and receivables held for ≥ 1 lunar year.
zakat.helpStep4: Liabilities — Only debts due within this lunar year. Do not include multi-year mortgage balance (only the current year’s instalment).
zakat.helpStep5: Results — Update in real-time. If Net Wealth ≥ Nisab: Zakat Due = Net Wealth × 2.5%.
zakat.helpExample: Example: gold 102.88 USD/g · assets 30,000 − debts 3,000 = net 27,000 · nisab ≈ 9,000 → Zakat due: 675.00 USD
